regions.name: Null Void Expanse
regions.description: An endless gray nothing outside the normal universe — Ben 10's dimension of banishment. No sky, no horizon, just drifting debris pulled in from a thousand worlds.

environmentalCodes.description: No sun or sky — faint light radiates from the void itself.
Thin but breathable; sound carries strangely far.

nodes.name: The Drifting Battlefield
nodes.description: A flat plate of fused wreckage and rock, big enough to fight on, tumbling slowly with no up or down to speak of.

nodes.name: The Wreckage Field
nodes.description: A loose cluster of broken ships and stone outcroppings, close enough to the battlefield to leap between.
